properties.Test Case: Check which font files and font faces are added to the epub. Bold and Italic should be included. (An ePub is just a zip file. Unzip and look in "fonts" folder.)
properties.Steps: Check which font files and font faces are added to the epub. Bold and Italic should be included. (An ePub is just a zip file. Unzip and look in "fonts" folder.)

properties.Test Case: Try at least one epub on a phone; make sure it looks right and audio plays (If you don't have the Simply Reading app, Infinity Reader will play audio automagically if you hold the phone right.) Dolphin EasyReader can play embedded audio, but looks awful. Even it tries to use TTS instead of embedded audio at times. Other readers all seem to use only TTS and ignore the embedded audio.
properties.Steps: Try at least one epub on a phone; make sure it looks right and audio plays  (If you don't have the Simply Reading app, Infinity Reader will play audio automagically if you hold the phone right.)  Dolphin EasyReader can play embedded audio, but looks awful.  Even it tries to use TTS instead of embedded audio at times.  Other readers all seem to use only TTS and ignore the embedded audio.

properties.Test Case: Set the settings:book making:special script settings to Right to Left. Export to epub and verify that things look right, including: navigation arrows work opposite direction. Note: "not addressed hiding the inapplicable button when showing the first or last page".
properties.Steps: Set the settings:book making:special script settings to Right to Left. Export to epub and verify that things look right, including: navigation arrows work opposite direction. Note: "not addressed hiding the inapplicable button when showing the first or last page".

properties.Test Case: Ensure that only fonts for the local and national language are embedded when the regional (L3) language is never used in the book, and that fonts assigned to styles are not embedded if the styles aren't used in the final book. (and conversely that all fonts needed are embedded for all three languages and for customized styles.) Currently, this is a bug we're willing to live with.
properties.Steps: Ensure that only fonts for the local and national language are embedded when the regional (L3) language is never used in the book, and that fonts assigned to styles are not embedded if the styles aren't used in the final book. (and conversely that all fonts needed are embedded for all three languages and for customized styles.)  Currently, this is a bug we're willing to live with.

properties.Test Case: Test summary/description in epub metadata is same as "summary" in BLib. publish. Ensure editing & mouse movements work ok.
properties.Steps: Test summary/description in epub metadata is same as "summary" in BLib. publish. Ensure editing & mouse movements work ok.
